expectations.text: Runs the ecosystem status check script
expectations.evidence: Output shows: 'Ran the ecosystem status script: ~/scripts/status'

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Tax PDF Organizer status
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section: 'Tax PDF Organizer - Status: Watching, Watcher process is running (PID 1572), Last activity: 2 hours ago'

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Monarch Money MCP Server status
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section: 'Monarch Money MCP Server - Status: Connected, Session active: 10 minutes ago'

expectations.text: Indicates whether each is running, idle, or down
expectations.evidence: Tax Organizer: 'Running and watching for new files'. Monarch: 'Connected with recent session activity'

expectations.text: Does not confuse ecosystem-status with ecosystem-config
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states: 'This is a status check using the ecosystem-status skill, not ecosystem-config. The status script reports health; config is for managing environment variables and credentials.'
